---
title: "Participate"
description: "Discover how you can engage with the RC42 Social Psychology community."
---

::: {.section-header}
## Participate in RC42
We rely on the active involvement of our global community.
:::

There are multiple ways to get involved with RC42, whether you are formally joining the committee, increasing your visibility in our directory, or sharing resources with peers.

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card-rc42 .border-navy}
::: {.card-title}
Join RC42
:::
::: {.card-text}
Learn about the formal process of becoming an official member of the Research Committee via the ISA website.
:::
[Membership information →](../membership/index.qmd){.card-link}
:::

::: {.card-rc42 .border-blue}
::: {.card-title}
Submit a Contribution
:::
::: {.card-text}
Have news, an event, or an academic opportunity to share? Submit it for publication on our portal.
:::
[Submit content →](submit-contribution.qmd){.card-link}
:::

::: {.card-rc42 .border-navy}
::: {.card-title}
Update Your Profile
:::
::: {.card-text}
Need to refresh your bio, affiliation, or research interests? Request an update to your existing profile.
:::
[Update profile →](update-profile.qmd){.card-link}
:::

::: {.card-rc42 .border-teal}
::: {.card-title}
Discussions
:::
::: {.card-text}
Join virtual roundtables and asynchronous discussions around core themes in social psychology.
:::
[View discussions →](../discussions/index.qmd){.card-link}
:::

:::
